---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Remembr.dev
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve. Who benefits from this?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this could work. Include API shapes, configuration options, or UI sketches if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
